use_cases: Showcasing team members on an About or landing page
Displaying contributors or project team members on developer platforms
Creating interactive team sections in portfolios
Presenting organization staff with social media links
Building company profiles with animated card interactions
ai_summary: A futuristic team showcase component with 3D tilting cards that respond to mouse movement using spring physics. Features team member profiles with avatars, titles, and social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter), with staggered entrance animations triggered on scroll. Built with Framer Motion for smooth parallax-like interactions and hover glow effects, ideal for modern SaaS landing pages and About sections.
